mapper.sql: ocr_id, attachment_id, ocr_status, preview_html, plain_text, ocr_blocks_json, ocr_raw_json, qwen_layout_json, parse_source, approximate, parse_warnings, page_count, ocr_model, qwen_model, ocr_duration_ms, qwen_duration_ms, ocr_error, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, is_deleted, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM contract_attachment_ocr WHERE attachment_id = #{attachmentId} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contract_attachment_ocr ( attachment_id, ocr_status, preview_html, plain_text, ocr_blocks_json, ocr_raw_json, qwen_layout_json, parse_source, approximate, parse_warnings, page_count, ocr_model, qwen_model, ocr_duration_ms, qwen_duration_ms, ocr_error, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, is_deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{attachmentId}, #{ocrStatus}, #{previewHtml}, #{plainText}, #{ocrBlocksJson}, #{ocrRawJson}, #{qwenLayoutJson}, #{parseSource}, COALESCE(#{approximate}, 0), #{parseWarnings}, #{pageCount}, #{ocrModel}, #{qwenModel}, #{ocrDurationMs}, #{qwenDurationMs}, #{ocrError}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedBy}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted}, #{version} )
mapper.update: UPDATE contract_attachment_ocr SET ocr_status = #{ocrStatus}, preview_html = #{previewHtml}, plain_text = #{plainText}, ocr_blocks_json = #{ocrBlocksJson}, ocr_raw_json = #{ocrRawJson}, qwen_layout_json = #{qwenLayoutJson}, parse_source = #{parseSource}, approximate = COALESCE(#{approximate}, 0), parse_warnings = #{parseWarnings}, page_count = #{pageCount}, ocr_model = #{ocrModel}, qwen_model = #{qwenModel}, ocr_duration_ms = #{ocrDurationMs}, qwen_duration_ms = #{qwenDurationMs}, ocr_error = #{ocrError}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE attachment_id = #{attachmentId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contract_attachment_ocr ( attachment_id, ocr_status, preview_html, plain_text, ocr_blocks_json, ocr_raw_json, qwen_layout_json, parse_source, approximate, parse_warnings, page_count, ocr_model, qwen_model, ocr_duration_ms, qwen_duration_ms, ocr_error, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, is_deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{attachmentId}, #{ocrStatus}, #{previewHtml}, #{plainText}, #{ocrBlocksJson}, #{ocrRawJson}, #{qwenLayoutJson}, #{parseSource}, COALESCE(#{approximate}, 0), #{parseWarnings}, #{pageCount}, #{ocrModel}, #{qwenModel}, #{ocrDurationMs}, #{qwenDurationMs}, #{ocrError}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedBy}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted}, #{version} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE ocr_status = VALUES(ocr_status), preview_html = VALUES(preview_html), plain_text = VALUES(plain_text), ocr_blocks_json = VALUES(ocr_blocks_json), ocr_raw_json = VALUES(ocr_raw_json), qwen_layout_json = VALUES(qwen_layout_json), parse_source = VALUES(parse_source), approximate = COALESCE(VALUES(approximate), 0), parse_warnings = VALUES(parse_warnings), page_count = VALUES(page_count), ocr_model = VALUES(ocr_model), qwen_model = VALUES(qwen_model), ocr_duration_ms = VALUES(ocr_duration_ms), qwen_duration_ms = VALUES(qwen_duration_ms), ocr_error = VALUES(ocr_error), updated_by = VALUES(updated_by), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at), is_deleted = 0, version = version + 1
mapper.update: UPDATE contract_attachment_ocr SET is_deleted = 1, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, version = version + 1 WHERE attachment_id = #{attachmentId} AND is_deleted = 0
